#### II.2.b No internal model

::: {.aside .meta-note}
**META:** Empty branch, a finding, not a portrait. Once Christiano leans toward "expects," the single-dominant branch concentrates at the knowing-optimizer leaf, leaving this and the "mistake" node thin.
:::

The tree allows a branch almost no one occupies: a system capable enough to dominate and cause catastrophe with no model of the danger it creates. Think of Post 2's missile-detection system, or an oblivious parent with the wrong medicine, all the power to harm and none of the understanding to avoid it. No major thinker centers it. That emptiness is itself a finding. The tree marks a case the discourse does not, either an under-theorized blind spot or a tacit bet that anything capable enough to dominate will not be that ignorant.
